channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Temporary inflation dip unlikely to ease Reserve Bank concerns amid supply shocks
item.description: Fresh economic commentary suggests Australia may be about to record a temporary fall in headline inflation, but economists warn this will do little to ease the Reserve Bank of Australia’s (RBA) underl...

item.title: South Africa’s steel industry under pressure from cheap imports and global overcapacity
item.description: South Africa’s steel industry is under severe strain due to a surge in cheap imported steel that is undercutting local producers and threatening thousands of jobs. According to Ayabonga Cawe, chief co...

item.title: BJP candidate secures decisive win in Falta repoll in West Bengal with over 1 lakh vote margin
item.description: Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) candidate Debangshu Panda registered a significant victory in the Falta Assembly repoll in West Bengal, defeating Communist Party of India (Marxist) candidate Sambhu Nath ...

item.title: Rescuers continue search operations after building collapse in Pampanga amid reported signs of life
item.description: Patuloy ang search and rescue operations sa isang gumuhong gusali sa Pampanga matapos iulat ng mga responder na may mga posibleng “signs of life” pang namo-monitor mula sa loob ng debris. Ayon sa ulat...

item.title: Eight people, including seven women, die in river drowning incident near Bhatkal in Uttara Kannada
item.description: At least eight people, including seven women, lost their lives in a tragic drowning incident in the Thatte Hakkalu river in Karnataka’s Uttara Kannada district near Bhatkal. According to police source...

item.title: UN opens 38 job opportunities at Nairobi duty station for Kenyan applicants across multiple categories
item.description: The United Nations has announced 38 job vacancies at its Nairobi duty station, offering a wide range of opportunities for Kenyan professionals, graduates, and interns. The positions cut across several...

item.title: Analysis of Trump’s Proposed White House Ballroom and Its Political Symbolism
item.description: This opinion article by Paul Blumenthal examines the controversy surrounding Donald Trump’s proposed White House ballroom project during his second term, framing it as a continuation of his long-stand...

item.title: Reggae star urges government investment in music and entertainment as key driver of Nigeria’s economy
item.description: A veteran reggae musician, Jah Device, has called on both the Federal and state governments in Nigeria to take the music and wider entertainment industry more seriously, describing it as a major but u...

item.title: Ben Lerner’s ‘Transcription’: Memory, Technology and the Limits of Recording Human Experience
item.description: This review discusses Ben Lerner’s novel ‘Transcription’, which explores the fragile nature of memory in an increasingly digital world. The book follows a 45-year-old writer who travels to interview h...

item.title: Democratic Socialists host Dungeons & Dragons-themed political fundraiser in Hollywood
item.description: A Los Angeles Democratic Socialists of America (DSA) fundraising event brought together local political candidates and fans of the tabletop role-playing game Dungeons & Dragons for an unconventional c...

item.title: Three Red Cross volunteers die after contracting Ebola during humanitarian work in DR Congo
item.description: Three volunteers from the Red Cross in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DR Congo) have died after reportedly contracting Ebola while carrying out humanitarian work in the northeastern province of Itu...

item.title: Hannah Murray discusses mental health crisis following involvement with a wellness group and subsequent hospitalisation
item.description: Former Skins and Game of Thrones actress Hannah Murray has spoken candidly about a severe mental health crisis that resulted in her hospitalisation and a later diagnosis of bipolar disorder. In a rece...

item.title: Davido begins construction of N8 billion family mansion in Eko Atlantic, Lagos
item.description: Popular Nigerian music star David Adeleke, widely known as Davido, has started the construction of a luxury family mansion in Lagos State, specifically within the high-end Eko Atlantic City. According...

item.title: Transgender Athlete AB Hernandez Qualifies for California State Track Meet in Multiple Events
item.description: Transgender athlete AB Hernandez from Jurupa Valley High School continued to make headlines at the 2026 CIF Southern Section Track & Field Masters Meet in Moorpark, California. On May 23, 2026, Hernan...

item.title: South African regulators intensify efforts to combat substandard and falsified medicines
item.description: The article explores the growing threat of substandard and falsified medicines in South Africa and the efforts by regulators to address the issue. It highlights how patients, particularly those seekin...

item.title: Cooling mattresses, sheets and pillows designed to improve sleep comfort during warmer weather
item.description: The article highlights a range of cooling bedding products intended to help people sleep more comfortably as temperatures rise during spring and summer. It explains that overheating at night and night...

item.title: Legal Community Seeks Clarity After Lawyer Arrested During Court Session
item.description: A lawyer was recently arrested while taking part in court proceedings, an incident that has attracted attention from both the legal fraternity and members of the public. According to available informa...

item.title: Crystal Palace vs Arsenal: TV coverage, kick-off time and Premier League trophy presentation details
item.description: Arsenal travel to Selhurst Park to face Crystal Palace on the final day of the Premier League season in a match that doubles as a title celebration for the newly crowned champions. Although the fixtur...

item.title: State of emergency declared in California as chemical storage tank threatens explosion in Orange County
item.description: California Governor Gavin Newsom declared a state of emergency on Saturday in response to a developing chemical hazard in Orange County, where officials are warning of a possible explosion or major le...

item.title: ICC lawyer warns Duterte allies’ statements and actions may affect case and accountability issues
item.description: An International Criminal Court (ICC) assistant to counsel, Atty. Kristina Conti, raised concerns that recent statements and actions by key Filipino political figures could have implications for ongoi...
